title: GitLab security advisory (AV26-406)
description: On April 29, 2026, GitLab published a security advisory to address vulnerabilities in the following products:
products: GitLab Community Edition (CE)  versions prior to 18.11.2 and 18.10.5
GitLab Enterprise Edition (EE)  versions prior to 18.11.2 and 18.10.5
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
